chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-510 of 2017. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For orders on M.A.No.2782/2017. 3. For orders on maintainability of M.A.No.2783/2017. 4. For orders on maintainability of main case. 01.02.2022. Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A. G. -.-.-.-.-.-.- After going through the comments filed by the Chairman, District Council, Larkana, it is stated by the learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant constitutional petition before this Court on merits provided the petitioner is permitted to exhaust his remedy before his department or any other forum in accordance with law. Order accordingly. J Judge
